channel.title: Wordfence — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Wordfence (wordfence).

item.title: CVE-2026-9253 · 7.2 HIGH — WP Cost Estimation & Payment Forms Builder (E&P Forms) <= 10.5.97 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'customerInfos' Parameter
item.description: The WP Cost Estimation & Payment Forms Builder (E&P Forms) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'customerInfos' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 10.5.97 due to insufficient input sanitization and ou…

item.title: CVE-2026-12428 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Blocks for ACF Fields <= 1.6.2 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Author+) Arbitrary ACF Field Value Disclosure via 'id' Parameter
item.description: The Blocks for ACF Fields plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data due to a missing capability check on the get_all_values() function in the /wp-json/acf-field-blocks/v1/values REST endpoint in versions up to, and including,…

item.title: CVE-2026-9021 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Easy Invoice <= 2.1.19 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary Quote Accept/Decline and Invoice Creation via easy_invoice_accept_quote / easy_invoice_decline_quote AJAX Actions
item.description: The Easy Invoice plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 2.1.19. This is due to the plugin registering the easy_invoice_accept_quote and easy_invoice_decline_quote AJAX actions via wp_ajax_nopriv_…

item.title: CVE-2026-9237 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Employee, Leave and Recruitment Management System <= 1.2.2 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Job Deletion via crewhrm_singleJobAction AJAX Action
item.description: The Employee, Leave and Recruitment Management System – Crew HRM plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.2.2. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to per…

item.title: CVE-2026-9235 · 4.3 MEDIUM — DHL eCommerce (Benelux) for WooCommerce <= 2.2.3 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Shipping Label Creation and Deletion via dhlpwc_label_create and dhlpwc_label_delete AJAX Actions
item.description: The DHL eCommerce (Benelux) for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification and loss of data due to a missing capability check and missing nonce verification on the create_label() and delete_label() functions in versio…

item.title: CVE-2026-14372 · 7.1 HIGH — Bit Form <= 3.1.1 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary File Deletion via '_old' Parameter
item.description: The Bit Form – Contact Form, Payment Forms, Multi Step Forms, Calculator & Custom Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file deletion due to insufficient file path validation in the deleteFiles function in all versions up to, a…

item.title: CVE-2026-4275 · 8.8 HIGH — Divi Torque Lite <= 4.2.3 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Arbitrary Plugin Installation via 'install_plugin' REST Endpoint
item.description: The Divi Torque Lite – Divi Theme, Divi Builder & Extra Theme plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 4.2.3. This is due to the use of '__return_true' as the permission_callback for the /…

item.title: CVE-2026-4298 · 4.3 MEDIUM — DSGVO All in one for WP <= 4.9 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Settings Reset
item.description: The DSGVO All in one for WP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to and including 4.9. This is due to the dsgvo_reset_policy_service_func() function lacking both capability checks and nonce verification while…

item.title: CVE-2026-9028 · 5.3 MEDIUM — CorvusPay WooCommerce Payment Gateway <= 2.7.4 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Arbitrary Order Cancellation via 'order_number' Parameter
item.description: The CorvusPay WooCommerce Payment Gateway plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.7.4. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This ma…

item.title: CVE-2026-9027 · 5.3 MEDIUM — CorvusPay WooCommerce Payment Gateway <= 2.7.4 - Unauthenticated Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature to Payment Bypass via /wp-json/corvuspay/success/ REST Endpoint
item.description: The CorvusPay WooCommerce Payment Gateway plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Payment Bypass via Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature in all versions up to, and including, 2.7.4. The `corvuspay_success_handler` function registers the RE…

item.title: CVE-2026-13441 · 7.2 HIGH — EventPrime <= 4.3.4.2 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'new_event_type_background_color' Parameter
item.description: The EventPrime – Events Calendar, Bookings and Tickets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'new_event_type_background_color' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.3.4.2 due to insufficient input sanit…

item.title: CVE-2026-9240 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Colissimo Officiel : Méthodes de livraison pour WooCommerce <= 2.9.0 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Order Shipment Modification via lpc_order_affect AJAX action

item.title: CVE-2026-12433 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hydra Booking <= 1.2.1 - Authenticated (Custom+) Insecure Direct Object Reference to Sensitive Information Exposure via 'booking_id' Parameter
item.description: The Hydra Booking – Appointment Scheduling & Booking Calendar plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in versions up to, and including, 1.2.1 via the /wp-json/hydra-booking/v1/booking/details/{id} REST endpoint. This is…
